loginFlow.v2.intro2.text: Verifikasi nomormu, terhubung dengan teman, dan mulai jelajah. Cuma sekitar satu menit.

Kamu sudah masuk!

postLoginFlow.v2.contactsImport.text: Vexl bekerja lewat koneksi nyata — teman dan temannya teman. Impor kontakmu untuk melihat siapa yang sudah ada di sini.
postLoginFlow.v2.notificationSetup.title: Tetap dapat kabar

Bagaimana kamu ingin
menggunakan Vexl?

offer.title: Offer
offer.noCommonFriendsExplanation: Kamu tidak punya teman bersama. Apa artinya ini?
offer.noCommonFriends.title: Kamu tidak punya teman bersama
offer.noCommonFriends.description: Kamu melihat penawaran ini karena orang lain menyimpan nomor teleponmu di daftar kontak mereka. Tetap hati-hati, kami tidak bisa memastikan apakah kalian benar-benar saling kenal di dunia nyata.
offer.clubOfferExplanation: Ini penawaran klub. Apa artinya ini?
offer.clubOffer.title: Penawaran klub
offer.clubOffer.description: Kamu melihat penawaran ini karena orang lain adalah anggota klub yang sama denganmu. Tetap hati-hati, kami tidak bisa memastikan apakah kalian benar-benar saling kenal di dunia nyata.
offer.offerNotFound: Offer not found. It might have been deleted by the author
offer.sendMessagePlaceholder: mis. Hai, aku tertarik dengan penawaranmu...
offer.report.areYouSureText: Are you certain about reporting this offer? Once reported, it cannot be undone. Choose wisely.
offer.report.reportLimitReached: You have reached the maximum number of reports for today. Try again in 24 hours.
offer.interactedRecently: Kamu baru saja berinteraksi dengan trade ini.
offer.canSendAgainTomorrow: Kamu bisa mengirim pesan lagi besok.
offer.canSendAgainDays: Kamu bisa mengirim pesan lagi dalam {{days}} hari.
offer.requestStatus.requested: You've requested a trade. We'll notify you once it's accepted.
offer.requestStatus.initial: This will be your first interaction with this offer.
offer.requestStatus.cancelled: You previously cancelled the trade request for this offer.
offer.requestStatus.deleted: You have already interacted with this user regarding this offer, but you deleted the chat.
offer.requestStatus.otherSideLeft: You have already interacted with this offer, but the counterparty left the chat.
offer.requestStatus.leaved: You have already interacted with this offer before.
offer.offerFromFriendOfFriend: Offer from a friend of a friend
offer.youSeeThisOfferBecause: You see this offer because the counterparty has your phone number saved in their contact list.
offer.beCautiousWeCannotVerify: Be cautious, we cannot verify if you really know each other in the real life.
offer.dontForgetToVerifyTheIdentity: Don't forget to verify their identity with a common contact.
offer.noDirectConnection: This is a contact with whom you have no direct connection.
offer.rerequestTomorrow: You can send another request tomorrow.
offer.rerequestDays: You can send another request in {{days}} days.
offer.requestWasCancelledOrAccountDelete: Seems like other side has cancelled the request or deleted their account. Do you want to delete this request?
offer.requestNotFound: Unable to approve. Other side has deleted their account.
offer.otherSideAccountDeleted: Other side has deleted their account
termsOfUse.dontHaveTime2: Lagi tidak punya waktu? Cek FAQ saja.
termsOfUse.cautiousNoticeAboutMachineTra: Cautious Notice: The following text has undergone machine translation for your convenience, to access the original English version, proceed to the web.
faqs.vexlIsPlatform: Vexl is a platform where you can trade Bitcoin within your real world social network - your friends and friends of their friends - while staying completely anonymous - if you wish.
faqs.peopleWhomYouAllowToSee: People you allow to see your identity can view your name and profile picture, and that's it.
faqs.howCanIStayAnonymous: Bagaimana caranya tetap anonim dan tetap menggunakan Vexl?
faqs.byDefaultYouParticipateInTheNetwork: By default, you participate in the network under your Vexl name and Vexl avatar that were given to you during the registration. You can only reveal your identity per a particular trade in our secure, end to end encrypted chat.
faqs.howDoIKnowWhoIAmTalkingTo: Bagaimana aku tahu dengan siapa aku bicara?
faqs.oneChallenge: One challenge with truly anonymous communications systems like Vexl is that sometimes you do need to verify the identity of the person you’re talking to! In cases like these, it’s best to use a secure secondary channel of communication to confirm with the other person that you’re both who you say you are.
faqs.vexlIsOpensource: Vexl bersifat open source - siapa pun bisa memeriksa backdoor atau niat jahat. Kamu juga bisa melihat laporan dari Security Audit independen.
faqs.vexlIsDesigned: Vexl is designed to never collect or store any sensitive information. Vexl messages and other content cannot be accessed by us or other third parties because they are always end-to-end encrypted, private, and secure. Our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy are available below.
faqs.youCanAlwaysReachOutToUs: You can always reach out to us via email: support@vexl.it. For a private comms, you can also send us an e2ee mail. Or you can meet us during your next P2P trade! 😻
faqs.whatAreVexlClubsAndWhyShouldIJoin: What are Vexl Clubs and why should I join?
faqs.clubsConnectYouWithBroaderNetwork: Clubs connect you with a broader network, enabling opportunities outside your immediate friends. While Clubs offer more variety, trading within them is less secure than with Level 1 or Level 2 friends.
offerForm.somethingElseOnYourMind: Ada hal lain yang kamu pikirkan?
offerForm.discardNewOfferDescription: Kalau kamu menutup ini sekarang, semua detail yang sudah kamu masukkan akan dibuang.
offerForm.location.onlineTradeWarning: Trade tatap muka lebih aman. Pelajari apa yang perlu diwaspadai saat trade online.
offerForm.location.meetingInPersonSafer: Bertemu langsung lebih aman. Jangan bagikan alamat rumahmu kecuali kamu benar-benar percaya pada orang lain itu.
offerForm.location.receivePaymentsSafely:
Uang yang dikirim oleh orang acak bisa berasal dari kejahatan dan dapat dilacak. Jangan pernah kirim bitcoin sebelum menerima pembayaran.

Selalu verifikasi nama pemilik rekening asal pembayaran yang kamu terima dengan identitas yang dinyatakan oleh pihak lawan.

Kirim alamat dengan cara yang aman dan pastikan untuk memverifikasinya lewat kanal aman lainnya.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.sellDescript: Tambahkan diskon agar lebih cepat terjual, atau premium untuk mendapat lebih banyak. Lihat pengaruhnya pada permintaan dengan menggeser slider.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.buyDescripti: Tambahkan diskon untuk membeli lebih murah, atau premium agar lebih cepat membeli. Lihat pengaruhnya pada permintaan dengan menggeser slider.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyForThe: You buy for the actual market price. Play with the slider to buy cheaply or faster.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.theOptimalPo: The optimal position for most people. You buy slightly faster, but a bit overpriced.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyReally: You buy quickly, but so much above the market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyPretty: You buy pretty cheap, but it can take slightly longer to find a seller.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyVeryCh: You buy very cheaply, but it can take a while to find seller.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellForTh: You sell for the actual market price. Play with the slider to sell faster or earn more.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youEarnBitMo: You earn a bit more, but it can take slightly longer.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youEarnSoMuc: You earn so much more, but it can take a while.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellSligh: You sell slightly faster, but a bit below market price
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellMuchF: You sell much faster, but far below market price
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.selli: Kamu menjual dengan harga pasar. Geser ke kiri untuk menjual lebih cepat, atau ke kanan untuk mendapat lebih banyak.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.earnB: Kamu akan mendapat sedikit lebih banyak, tapi mungkin butuh sedikit lebih lama untuk menemukan pembeli.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.earnM: Kamu akan mendapat jauh lebih banyak, tapi menemukan pembeli mungkin butuh lebih lama.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.sellS: Kamu akan menjual lebih cepat, tapi sedikit di bawah harga pasar.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.sellM: Kamu akan menjual sangat cepat, tapi jauh di bawah harga pasar.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.influenceImp: Influence the impact of your offer. Sell faster by adding a discount, or earn more by adding a premium to the Bitcoin market price.
Influence the impact of your offer. Buy cheaply by adding a discount, or buy faster by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.playWithItAn: Play with it and see how it affects the interest of others.
offerForm.buyCheaperByUsingDiscount: Buy cheaper by using a discount or buy faster by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price
offerForm.sellFasterWithDiscount: Sell faster with a discount or earn more by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price.
offerForm.location.meetingInPerson: Meeting in person is safer. What to watch out for online?
offerForm.location.whatToWatchOutForOnli: What to watch out for online?
offerForm.location.moneySentByRandomPers: Money sent by a random person can be of criminal origin and traceable.
offerForm.location.neverSendCrypto: Never send bitcoin before receiving payment.
offerForm.location.alwaysVerifyTheName: Always verify the name of the account holder you received the payment from with the declared identity of the counterparty.
offerForm.location.forwardTheAddress: Forward the address in a secure manner and be sure to verify it through another secure channel.
offerForm.location.setAreaDescription: Atur area tempat kamu bersedia bertemu untuk trade. Ini membantu menampilkan penawaran relevan di sekitarmu.
offerForm.location.meetingAreaDescriptio: Atur di mana kamu bersedia bertemu. Kamu akan melihat penawaran yang area bertemunya tumpang tindih dengan areamu.
offerForm.pickupDescription: Choose the approximate location where you can hand out the item.
offerForm.deliveryDescription: Send the item using a third party delivery service.
offerForm.pickupDeliveryIsSafer: Pickup in person is safer. Never share your home address with anyone you don’t trust.
offerForm.thePriceIsFixedToFiat: The price is set in fiat and then approximated in BTC.
offerForm.thisItemDoesNotHaveSetPrice: This item does not have a set price.
offerForm.network.theBestOption: The best option for really small amounts. Usually super fast.
offerForm.network.lightningDescription: Paling cocok untuk jumlah kecil. Cepat dan murah.
offerForm.network.theBestFor: The best for larger amounts. Slower.
offerForm.network.onChainDescription: Paling cocok untuk jumlah besar. Lebih lambat, tapi lebih aman.

editProfileScreen.addIdentity.descriptio: Trade jadi lebih mudah saat teman mengenalimu. Kamu memilih kapan dan siapa yang melihat infomu.
editProfileScreen.vexlAlias.title: Alias vexl-mu
editProfileScreen.vexlAlias.subtitle: Begini orang lain melihatmu. Identitas aslimu tetap tersembunyi sampai kamu memilih untuk mengungkapkannya.
editProfileScreen.phoneNumber.title: Nomor telepon
editProfileScreen.phoneNumber.subtitle: Nomor teleponmu tetap privat. Tidak ada yang melihatnya kecuali kamu membagikannya.

editProfileScreen.spokenLanguages.subtit: Beri tahu orang lain bahasa apa yang nyaman kamu gunakan untuk trade.
editProfileScreen.identityPhoto.title: Tambah foto
editProfileScreen.identityPhoto.descript: Tambahkan foto supaya orang mengenalimu saat bertemu.
editProfileScreen.nickname.title: Tambah nama panggilan
editProfileScreen.nickname.description: Pilih nama yang akan dilihat orang saat kamu trade.
editProfileScreen.identitySummary.title: Semuanya sudah siap
editProfileScreen.identitySummary.infoBo: Identitasmu tetap privat sampai kamu memilih untuk membagikannya.
editProfileScreen.identitySummary.descri: Identitasmu siap dibagikan kapan pun kamu memutuskan.
Pilih bahasa yang nyaman kamu gunakan untuk trade.

notificationPrompt.errorAlert.title: Unable to obtain notification permissions
notificationPrompt.errorAlert.descriptio: You need to enable the notifications in the settings.
notificationPrompt.explanation1.title: Enable notifications
notificationPrompt.explanation1.descript: Vexl relies on background notifications to distribute your offers, requests, and messages across your social network.
For Vexl to function properly, please make sure to enable notifications. You can always adjust your settings later.
notificationPrompt.explanation2.title: Are you sure?
notificationPrompt.explanation2.descript: Vexl REALLY relies on background notifications in order to work properly. Without notifications, you won’t get the best out of it.

unexpectedReachDrop.title: Drop in reach detected
unexpectedReachDrop.description: We’ve detected an unexpected issue that may have affected your reach. To restore full visibility and ensure your offers work as expected, please re-import your contacts and re-encrypt your offers.
changeCurrency.trySearchingByCurrencyNam: Coba cari berdasarkan nama atau kode mata uang.
emptyMarketplace.vexlConnectsYouWithPeop: Vexl menghubungkanmu dengan orang yang kamu kenal dan percaya. Tambahkan kontakmu untuk melihat apa yang tersedia.
emptyMarketplace.weWillLetYouKnowOnceYou: Pastikan untuk mengaktifkan notifikasi - kami akan memberitahumu begitu teman-temanmu mulai muncul.
emptyMarketplace.exploreTheCommunity: Jelajahi Komunitas untuk bergabung dengan klub atau terhubung dengan lebih banyak orang di dekatmu.
emptyMarketplace.noOnePostedYet: Belum ada yang posting — kamu bisa jadi yang pertama. Atau perluas jaringanmu untuk melihat lebih banyak.
emptyMarketplace.turnOnNotificationsSoYo: Aktifkan notifikasi supaya kamu tidak melewatkan yang baru.

marketplace.importContactsSuggestion.des: Tambahkan kontak untuk memperluas jaringanmu dan menemukan lebih banyak peluang.
marketplace.enableNotificationsSuggestio: Aktifkan notifikasi untuk melihat update baru saat masuk.
marketplace.introDialog.title: Kamu sudah masuk!
marketplace.introDialog.description: Jelajahi apa yang ditawarkan dan dicari orang di dekatmu. Filter membantu kamu menemukan pasangan yang tepat.
